changes: Replaced verbose original SKILL.md (10KB + 40KB referenced files) with concise self-contained version focused on python-docx
Removed docx-js.md, ooxml.md, ooxml/, scripts/, LICENSE.txt — not referenced by optimized skill
Changed creation approach from docx-js (npm, not available in bare runtime) to python-docx (always available)
Changed text extraction from pandoc -t plain (drops Title headings) to python-docx paragraph iteration
Added explicit 'always run the script' rule — baseline model wrote code but never executed it
Simplified description to help model trigger skill loading more reliably
Provided inline working examples instead of referencing external files
